patterns_recognized: Consecutive-day same-matchup PLATINUM trap confirmed again: MIA@WSH (WSH lost 7-3 on 6/1, Alcantara went 7+ innings) repeats today with model again picking WSH. The 5/30 NYY@OAK lesson and 6/1 MIA@WSH postmortem both flag this: when the same series matchup fires PLATINUM on consecutive days and the prior-day SP neutralized the carry thesis, DOWNGRADE the repeat.

HARD CAP 9 non-fire on pick_prob=0.8185 (TOR@ATL): top bucket (>0.80) historically hits 33.3% actual vs 87.3% predicted (-53.9pp catastrophic miscalibration). HARD CAP 9 is absent from TOR@ATL grade_reasons despite pick_prob exceeding threshold; executive layer must apply SKIP manually when the code misses this cap.

SP data integrity error (KC@CIN): Model CSV lists CIN home SP as Chris Paddack (home_sp_k_pct=16.67%); MLB statsapi confirms actual CIN starter is Chase Burns — a materially better pitcher with elite K-rate (~28-30%). The pre-cap A-grade SP edge for KC (+1.47 xERA agrees with pick) was computed against the wrong pitcher and is unreliable or reversed.

Stage 2 bullpen-carry thesis requires negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap: today's three high-f5_full_delta picks (MIA@WSH delta=0.303, TEX@STL delta=0.215, COL@LAA delta=0.247) all require pen carry, but WSH pen gap is near-zero (-0.012), STL pen is worse (+0.001, HARD CAP 7 fired), and LAA has negative edge. The carry thesis has no structural insurance on any of these games.

MIA @ WSH.reasoning: WSH was picked at PLATINUM yesterday (6/1) and lost 7-3 as Alcantara went 7+ innings. Today is series G3, model again picks WSH. f5_full_delta=0.303 demands full-game pen carry, but PQI is AGAINST WSH (Δ=-9.4) and Max Meyer (26.71% K%) outstrips Alvarez (23.81%) — no SP edge for WSH. The 6/1 postmortem explicitly flags: opposing SP neutralizing WSH's Stage-2 carry confidence reduces conviction by one tier even with a slight bullpen gap (-0.012). Consecutive-day same-matchup PLATINUM trap. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.
lessons_applied: consecutive-day-same-matchup-PLATINUM-trap (5/30 NYY@OAK, 6/1 MIA@WSH)
opposing-SP-nullifies-Stage2-carry (6/1 postmortem pattern)
PQI-against-pick + large-f5_full_delta without SP edge = DOWNGRADE

DET @ TB.reasoning: TB picked at 65% full-game but edge=+2.52pp is outside [4,15]pp staking band and confidence_downgrade=True with acute_roster flag. Nick Martinez (TB, home) vs Troy Melton (DET, away) — SP data confirmed via statsapi. No reason to override the SKIP; edge outside band plus stress flags are sufficient for zero stake. TB directional lean is plausible but unactionable under current parameters.
lessons_applied: edge-outside-staking-band enforcement
confidence_downgrade_True + acute_roster stress flags suppress stake

CHW @ MIN.reasoning: D-grade (-2): Taj Bradley (MIN home, 27.49% K%) holds 0.83 xERA advantage over Erick Fedde (CHW away, 14.41% K%); PQI against CHW (Δ=+7.6); fair_prob=0.392 far below 0.42 threshold. SP confirmed via statsapi. D-grade dual-opposing-signal (SP edge against + PQI against) continues to be a reliable avoid indicator per archive. SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-opposing-signal (SP xERA + PQI both against pick) = directional avoid
fair_prob < 0.42 enforces SKIP independently

NYM @ SEA.reasoning: SEA picked at GOLD but edge=-6.85pp fires HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD prevention); HARD CAP 10 also fires at pick_prob=0.522 without CONFIRM. George Kirby (SEA home, 19.57% K%) vs Freddy Peralta (NYM away, 23.86% K%) — market prices SEA more favorably than model, meaning staking at model's inferior odds is negative-EV. Pre-cap B+ (3) was legitimate but HARD CAP 1 correctly blocks. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-1 negative-edge enforcement (market-knows-more principle)
HARD-CAP-10 bottom-bucket non-CONFIRM SKIP

SD @ PHI.reasoning: PHI PLATINUM with edge=-12.61pp — market prices PHI at 63.21% fair_prob vs model's 50.6%. F1_xera_gap=2.71 (Sánchez over Buehler) is a real signal but staking 12.61pp below market conviction is structurally negative-EV per HARD CAP 1. SP confirmed via statsapi. HARD CAP 10 also fires at pick_prob=0.506. CONFIRM SKIP on both caps; PHI may still win directionally but cannot be staked.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-1: market at 63% vs model 50.6% — large gap signals model underconfidence
HARD-CAP-10 bottom-bucket marginal-favorite SKIP

BAL @ BOS.reasoning: BOS picked at 50.9% with edge=-5.37pp; HARD CAP 1 fires. Chris Bassitt (BAL away) confirmed with 2.44 xERA advantage per grade_reasons; PQI confirms BOS (+34.9). Despite strong pre-cap signals (score=3), the negative edge means market prices BAL more favorably. Staking below market is negative-EV. HARD CAP 10 also fires at pick_prob=0.509. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-1 negative-edge GOLD enforcement
SP edge agrees with BOS but negative edge is EV-controlling signal

CLE @ NYY.reasoning: NYY picked at PLATINUM but D-grade (-1): Gavin Williams (CLE away, 27.95% K%) holds SP edge over Gerrit Cole (NYY home, 24.03% K%); PQI against NYY (Δ=-14.5). Kelly fractions are all zero — no stake regardless of tier designation. CLE (34-27) is a strong team vs NYY (36-23); coin-flip pick with signals against. D-grade zero-stake is correct. No qualitative reason to override upward.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-opposing-signal (SP + PQI both against NYY) = zero-stake
PLATINUM tier does not override D-grade kelly=0 outcome

KC @ CIN.reasoning: CRITICAL SP DATA ERROR: Model CSV lists CIN home SP as Chris Paddack (16.67% K%); MLB statsapi confirms actual CIN starter is Chase Burns — an elite young pitcher with ~28-30% K-rate and substantially better xERA. The pre-cap A-grade (score=5) was built on SP edge +1.47 xERA for KC vs Paddack; that comparison is invalid. With Burns (not Paddack) pitching, the SP edge is likely reversed. HARD CAP 10 already SKIPped this game; SP data error confirms DOWNGRADE is correct.
lessons_applied: SP-data-integrity-error: always verify live SP via statsapi before CONFIRM on SP-edge picks
executive-layer live verification catches pipeline errors that invalidate pre-cap grade
HARD-CAP-10 bottom-bucket (0.5318) correctly prevented stake before SP error discovered

TOR @ ATL.reasoning: pick_prob=0.8185 exceeds HARD CAP 9 threshold (>0.80 → historically 33.3% actual vs 87.3% predicted, -53.9pp catastrophic miscalibration). HARD CAP 9 is absent from grade_reasons — apparent code non-fire. F1_xera_gap=1.22* carries thin-sample asterisk on Grant Holmes; edge=+19.70pp is in the calibration_caution (18-25pp) soft-cap zone. ATL (40-20) may well win directionally, but top-bucket miscalibration is structural and must override. DOWNGRADE to SKIP per HARD CAP 9.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-9 manual application when code non-fires (pick_prob>0.80 = structural miscalibration)
F1*-thin-sample asterisk on ATL SP (Holmes) adds secondary caution
calibration_caution_18_25pp zone (soft cap 6.5) confirms exposure reduction needed

TEX @ STL.reasoning: STL GOLD B- requires pen carry (f5_full_delta=0.215, TEX wins F5 at 58.1%) but STL bullpen is slightly worse than TEX's (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.001, HARD CAP 7 fired). MacKenzie Gore (TEX away, 25.09% K%) significantly outclasses Pallante (STL home, 18.33% K%) with no SP xERA edge supporting STL. Edge=+15.20pp falls marginally outside [4,15]pp staking band (why_skipped confirms stake_mult=0). Three converging signals — pen disadvantage, Gore K% edge, edge outside band — support DOWNGRADE.
lessons_applied: Stage2-carry-thesis requires negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap (HARD CAP 7 near-zero over-fire noted but 3 converging factors outweigh)
MacKenzie-Gore-K%-advantage (25% vs 18%) without SP xERA edge = no STL SP conviction
edge-outside-[4,15]pp-band (stake_mult=0 per why_skipped)

PIT @ HOU.reasoning: HOU picked but D-grade (-2): Paul Skenes (PIT away, 29.41% K%) holds massive SP edge over Spencer Arrighetti (HOU home, 21.66% K%); PQI is strongly against HOU (Δ=-41.0 — largest negative PQI on today's slate). lessons_applied: D-grade dual-opposing-signal (Skenes xERA + PQI=-41 both massively against HOU)

COL @ LAA.reasoning: LAA picked at PLATINUM with F1_xera_gap=3.39 (Ureña > Lorenzen) but edge=-6.11pp fires HARD CAP 1. f5_full_delta=0.2465 — LAA expected to dominate F5 (76.5%) but full game is only 51.8%, suggesting an extreme Stage 2 bullpen carry that market doesn't price at LAA's advantage. SP confirmed via statsapi. HARD CAP 1 and HARD CAP 10 both fire. CONFIRM SKIP.

Stage2-carry with marginal pick_prob and negative edge = no stake regardless of F1 quality

LAD @ ARI.reasoning: LAD (away) picked with pick_prob=0.503 in extreme Stage 1/2 disagree (f5_full_delta=0.3444) — Shohei Ohtani dominates F5 at 84.8% but ARI's pen carries the full game to near-coin-flip. Edge=-14.14pp is very negative (market prices ARI as meaningful favorite). Zac Gallen (ARI home) vs Ohtani confirmed via statsapi. HARD CAP 10 fires at marginal pick_prob; large negative edge confirms market disagreement is decisive. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-10 bottom-bucket marginal-favorite: coin-flip away pick with large negative edge = no stake
extreme-Stage1/2-disagree (Δ=0.34) + negative edge: ARI pen carry thesis priced by market
